name: ieee-skills
description: Bilingual skills for writing IEEE communications-journal papers (JSAC, TWC, TC/TCOM, WCL, CL): literature search with DOI/BibTeX verification, drafting with target-journal routing, learning-based and emerging-paradigm system models, reproducible methods, language polishing, IEEE citation/IEEEtran formatting, simulation and empirical evidence design, publication figures, IEEEtran compile/debug, submission cover letters, reviewer responses, and WCL/CL letters.
